untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-leg spread trading across three different futures contracts (3x CL long, 2x RB short, 1x HO short) with a spread relationship calculation that cannot be expressed using single-instrument indicators from the allowed list. The signal depends on: (1) inter-market spread pricing between CL, RB, and HO; (2) the 3:2:1 hedge ratio validation; (3) spread mean reversion logic. The backtest engine as specified only supports single-instrument technical indicators. Additionally, critical parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period) are marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no values provided.
translation_notes: This is a calendar/crack spread arbitrage strategy that requires portfolio-level position management and cross-contract spread analytics. It cannot be reduced to entry/exit conditions on individual price bars using the provided indicator set. Recommend implementing as a specialized multi-leg spread module with explicit spread calculation, cointegration testing (Johansen), and dynamic hedge ratio adjustment.
